project_state.architectural_position: Signed-field-first v14 runtime with peak/band magnitude compatibility, topology-anchored corridor gating, component promotion/identity, trace-driven salience/caution + hold + recovery, plus a terminal shell and baseline freeze pack.

key_findings: Persists `state.signature.signed_field` and derived fields (polarity/zero_crossings/components/caution). (sim_v14_stage1.py:133-146)
Persists `state.reasoning.component_history`. (sim_v14_stage1.py:169)
Final corridor snapshot is built with `components` and `caution_field` wired in. (sim_v14_stage1.py:85)
uncertain_items: Artifact contains both `state.reasoning.phase_history` and a top-level `trace` (redundancy); unclear if intentional.

key_findings: `signed_field` is primary state; `amplitude` is derived from `abs(signed_field)`. (core/signature_state.py:10-13,37-38)
Polarized overlay fields exist (polarity/zero_crossings/mode_index/component_summary).
Component promotion state exists (components/component_history/active_component_id). (core/signature_state.py:27-30)
Trace salience + caution state exists (trace_salience/caution_scalar/caution_field). (core/signature_state.py:33-35)
Operator scoring/selection exists and is symmetry-aware. (core/reasoning_loop.py:_score_operator/_select_operator)
Diffusion runs on persistent `signed_field` and amplitude is re-derived. (core/reasoning_loop.py:335+)
Polarity + zero crossings are recomputed from persistent `signed_field`. (core/reasoning_loop.py:343+)
Components are extracted, matched across phases, and an active component is targeted with local/global blending. (core/reasoning_loop.py:265-316)
Trace salience + caution is computed from prior trace and projected onto component masks; component targeting is caution-aware. (core/reasoning_loop.py:319-356)
Hold logic exists when caution exceeds threshold. (core/reasoning_loop.py:386-397)
Trace includes salience/similarity/caution/hold and structural metrics. (core/reasoning_loop.py:462-479)
uncertain_items: Hold logic still applies relaxation decay via `(1-?)` even when hold triggers (no writeback, but state can shrink). This may be intended, but not stated explicitly.

key_findings: Operators `++`, `--`, `+-`, `-+` exist as read/write transforms. (core/orientation_ops.py:37-41)
Masked/local operator helper exists. (core/orientation_ops.py:47)
uncertain_items: The masked helper is not the mechanism used in the reasoning loop (the loop uses delta blending instead). This is fine as equivalent masked/local application, but usage is inconsistent across code.

key_findings: Peak + band detection exists with optional wraparound lattice support. (core/peak_detector.py:35+)
Polarity helpers exist (labeling + polarity/zero-crossings from signed source). (core/peak_detector.py:131+)
uncertain_items: Band model is heuristic (threshold expansion); not a full connected-component band segmentation beyond local expansion.

key_findings: Polarity assignment exists (3-state -1/0/+1).
Zero-crossing detection exists with wraparound option.
Run extraction exists (wraparound merge supported).
Mode/run labeling exists (`compute_mode_index`).
Family-lattice Laplacian exists. (core/diffusion_ops.py:8+)
Boundary modes implemented: wrap/reflect/clamp. (core/diffusion_ops.py:15-25)
Diffusion helper exists and returns diagnostics (diff_term, lap). (core/diffusion_ops.py:38+)
expected_but_missing: Orientation-channel diffusion is not implemented (config key exists but no implementation).

key_findings: Base corridor window exists (peak/band driven) with entry/exit resistance. (core/corridor_gate.py:126+)
Threshold-based admissibility exists in `apply_gate` (entry blocked under threshold). (core/corridor_gate.py:335)
Topology support + cancellation penalty fields exist and re-anchor the corridor. (core/corridor_gate.py (topology_support/cancellation_penalty fields and blending))
Entry can require topology support. (core/corridor_gate.py:339+)
Caution modulation exists (caution_field reduces window + tightens entry/exit). (core/corridor_gate.py:289-305)
Can accept explicit `components` to drive topology support. (core/corridor_gate.py (components parameter))
uncertain_items: Topology support uses a hard-coded wraparound assumption in one path (the helper path uses wraparound=True); behavior under non-wrap configs is not clearly validated.

key_findings: Component extraction from polarity runs exists.
Component matching across phases exists with persistence metrics.
Component masks exist.
Component caution aggregation exists (`component_caution_scores`).
uncertain_items: Split/merge counts are approximations via overlap graph, not a full tracking model.

key_findings: Trace salience computation exists (heuristic).
Structural similarity computation exists (coarse).
Caution scalar + caution field projection exists.
uncertain_items: Salience/similarity definitions are heuristic; correctness depends on intended semantics (not formally specified).

key_findings: Binary readout exists and consumes amplitude + corridor_window + class_heads. (core/readout_heads.py:9+)
State/trace JSON persistence exists via `save_state`. (core/io_state.py:4-6)
uncertain_items: Saves both `state.reasoning.phase_history` (inside state_dict) and a top-level `trace` (duplicate trace).

key_findings: Interactive session container exists for terminal use (turn history, debug toggles, last output).
Contains keys for phases 15 (signed field, topology corridor, components, salience/caution/hold).
Contains `orientation_diffusion` (consumed) and `hold_semantics` (consumed).
Terminal-oriented defaults exist (inline trace, readback level, debug toggles) for `interfaces/chat_shell.py`.
Interactive terminal shell exists with session history and command routing (`/trace`, `/state`, `/debug`, `/reset`, `/save`, `/load`).
Response rendering and layered trace summaries exist (default response/readback/debug panel).
CLI entrypoint exists for launching terminal shell (`--config`, `--seed`).
Baseline snapshot generator exists and writes `baseline/v14_baseline_snapshot.json` + `baseline/v14_baseline_manifest.json`.
Deterministic compact baseline snapshot exists for regression anchoring.
uncertain_items: `generated_at` is metadata and is not treated as a determinism signal.

key_findings: File hash manifest exists for baseline-relevant sources and snapshot provenance.
Pytest suite exists and passes.
Coverage includes diffusion, corridor gating, polarity/zero crossings, components, trace salience/hold/recovery, terminal shell, and baseline freeze regression.
uncertain_items: Determinism is anchored both by `tests/test_baseline_freeze.py` and by `scripts/test_v14_model.py`.

feature_matrix.feature: baseline freeze snapshot + manifest + regression test exist

notable_test_coverage: Corridor gating + topology penalties + signed-support entry gating + non-wrap regression (tests/test_corridor_gating.py)
Trace salience/caution/hold + hold semantics freeze + recovery/release (tests/test_trace_salience.py)
Terminal shell commands + save/load + seed determinism (tests/test_terminal_shell.py)
Baseline freeze pack snapshot + manifest regression anchor (tests/test_baseline_freeze.py)
untested_critical_areas: Operator ranking changes under strong caution (explicit comparative ranking assertions are limited)
Frequency/rarity of hold triggers under realistic configs (only threshold-forced tests exist)

observed_outputs: Existing `v14_model_test_report.json` shows PASS for determinism/binary sanity/components extracted/corridor neutrality checks.
Baseline freeze snapshot/manifest generation succeeded (`python scripts/gen_v14_baseline_snapshot.py --write`).
runtime_notes: Baseline and terminal entrypoints add repo-root to `sys.path` so they can be executed from `scripts/`.

inconsistencies.description: Artifact duplicates trace: `state.reasoning.phase_history` inside state plus a top-level `trace` saved by `core/io_state.py`.

current_risks: Heuristic nature of salience/similarity/caution may require calibration to avoid over-triggering or under-triggering hold.
Component targeting + caution-aware re-targeting can change control flow; tuning errors could destabilize operator selection.
Corridor reanchoring + caution penalties can make admissibility too strict (possible under high penalties/thresholds).
risk_assessment.stability_estimate: Good for a prototype: tests pass and core wiring appears consistent; main risks are tuning/semantics rather than missing functionality.

recommended_next_step.description: If desired, de-duplicate trace storage (keep either `state.reasoning.phase_history` or top-level `trace`), and add targeted tests for operator ranking shifts under strong caution plus hold-trigger frequency under realistic configs.
